CommunityApplications.Profile:
**Nvidia Status** — a comprehensive NVIDIA GPU dashboard and exporter for Unraid, including the **GDDR6/GDDR6X VRAM‑junction and hotspot temperatures that `nvidia-smi` hides** on consumer RTX 30/40 cards.
One container gives you a live web dashboard plus Prometheus, a JSON API, MQTT with Home Assistant auto‑discovery, and native InfluxDB (v1/v2) push for Grafana. Reports per‑GPU temps + thresholds, clocks, power (with optional per‑GPU power‑limit control), utilisation, VRAM, PCIe gen/width + live bandwidth, fan, throttle reasons, per‑process usage mapped to the owning Docker container, and NVENC encode sessions with codec + resolution. Multi‑GPU aware.
Requires the **Nvidia‑Driver** plugin.
Support via [GitHub issues](https://github.com/edddeduck/nvidia-status/issues).
